body.title: Self-training metrics on dashboard
body.result: Added _self_training_stats() to metrics.py: parses cognition_metrics.log for self_training_pass entries, returns last_run, scanned/gaps/deposited per pass, total_deposited all-time, 7-day gap rate (4.9% → densifying), daily gap rates sparkline. Wired into build_report() SELF-TRAINING section and /api/metrics JSON payload.
body.description: Expose self-training loop stats on metrics page: last run ts, scanned/covered/gaps/deposited per run, gap rate (gaps/scanned) trend toward 0 as matrix densifies, total self_training deposits all-time, 7-day avg gap rate as weaning trend line. Source: cognition_metrics.log entries where metric=self_training_pass or self_training_deposit.
